title: At the Doctor's

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكُمْ دَكْتُورُ. أَشْعُرُ بِأَلَمٍ شَدِيدٍ فِي رَأْسِي مُنْذُ يَوْمَيْنِ.
lines.bs: Selam alejkum, doktore. Osjećam jak bol u glavi već dva dana.
lines.en: Peace be upon you, Doctor. I have been feeling severe pain in my head for two days.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: وَعَلَيْكُمُ السَّلَامُ. أَهْلًا بِكَ. اجْلِسْ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ. هَلْ الأَلَمُ مُسْتَمِرٌّ أَمْ يَأْتِي وَيَذْهَبُ؟
lines.bs: Ve alejkum selam. Dobrodošli. Sjednite, molim. Je li bol stalna ili dolazi i odlazi?
lines.en: And peace be upon you. Welcome. Please sit down. Is the pain constant or does it come and go?

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: الأَلَمُ مُسْتَمِرٌّ، وَيَشْتَدُّ فِي الصَّبَاحِ. وَأَشْعُرُ أَيْضًا بِدَوَخَةٍ أَحْيَانًا.
lines.bs: Bol je stalna i pojačava se ujutro. Ponekad osjećam i vrtoglavicu.
lines.en: The pain is constant, and it intensifies in the morning. I also sometimes feel dizzy.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: أَفْهَمُ. هَلْ عِنْدَكَ حُمَّى؟ وَهَلْ تَنَامُ جَيِّدًا؟
lines.bs: Razumijem. Imate li temperaturu? I spavate li dobro?
lines.en: I understand. Do you have a fever? And are you sleeping well?

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: لَا أَعْتَقِدُ أَنَّ عِنْدِي حُمَّى. وَلَكِنَّ نَوْمِي مُضْطَرِبٌ فِي الأَيَّامِ الأَخِيرَةِ.
lines.bs: Ne mislim da imam temperaturu. Ali moj san je poremećen posljednjih dana.
lines.en: I don't think I have a fever. But my sleep has been disturbed in recent days.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: حَسَنًا. سَأَفْحَصُكَ الآنَ. افْتَحْ فَمَكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ. وَانْظُرْ إِلَى الْيَمِينِ.
lines.bs: Dobro. Pregledat ću vas sada. Otvorite usta, molim. I gledajte udesno.
lines.en: Very well. I will examine you now. Please open your mouth. And look to the right.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: هَلْ تَجِدُ شَيْئًا خَطِيرًا يَا دَكْتُورُ؟
lines.en: Do you find anything serious, Doctor?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: لَا تَقْلَقْ. يَبْدُو أَنَّكَ تُعَانِي مِنْ صُدَاعِ التَّوَتُّرِ بِسَبَبِ الإِجْهَادِ وَقِلَّةِ النَّوْمِ.
lines.bs: Ne brinite. Čini se da patite od tenzijskog glavobolje zbog umora i nedostatka sna.
lines.en: Don't worry. It seems you are suffering from tension headaches due to stress and lack of sleep.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: نَعَمْ، سَأَكْتُبُ لَكَ وَصْفَةً بِمُسَكِّنَاتِ الأَلَمِ وَأَقْرَاصٍ لِلنَّوْمِ. خُذِ الدَّوَاءَ مَرَّتَيْنِ فِي الْيَوْمِ.
lines.bs: Da, napisat ću vam recept za lijekove protiv bolova i tablete za spavanje. Uzimajte lijek dva puta dnevno.
lines.en: Yes, I will write you a prescription for pain relievers and sleeping tablets. Take the medicine twice a day.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: شُكْرًا دَكْتُورُ. كَمِ الْمُدَّةُ الَّتِي سَيَسْتَغْرِقُهَا الْعِلَاجُ؟
lines.bs: Hvala doktore. Koliko dugo će trajati liječenje?
lines.en: Thank you, Doctor. How long will the treatment take?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: خُذِ الدَّوَاءَ لِمُدَّةِ أُسْبُوعٍ. وَاحْرِصْ عَلَى النَّوْمِ الْكَافِي وَشُرْبِ الْمَاءِ.
lines.bs: Uzimajte lijek sedmicu dana. Pobrinite se da dovoljno spavate i pijete vodu.
lines.en: Take the medicine for one week. Make sure to get enough sleep and drink water.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: سَأَتَّبِعُ نَصِيحَتَكَ. هَلْ أَحْتَاجُ إِلَى مَوْعِدٍ آخَرَ؟
lines.bs: Slijedit ću vaš savjet. Trebam li novi termin?
lines.en: I will follow your advice. Do I need another appointment?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: إِذَا لَمْ يَتَحَسَّنِ الأَلَمُ بَعْدَ أُسْبُوعٍ فَعُدْ إِلَيَّ. أَتَمَنَّى لَكَ الشِّفَاءَ الْعَاجِلَ!
lines.bs: Ako se bol ne poboljša nakon sedmice, dođite ponovo. Želim vam brz oporavak!
lines.en: If the pain does not improve after a week, come back to me. I wish you a speedy recovery!

grammarFocus: present tense verb patterns and مُنْذُ for duration
